titleStmt.title: SII 31.100: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 100. (A.R. No. B 264 of 1938.) PEDDANAPĀḌU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken pillar lying near the Śiva temple.
This inscription is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Māgha, Śu. 7, corresponding to January 20, Sunday, 1549 A.D. (current).

Records the gift of lands situated in the village Peddanapāḍu by Chinna Timmayadēva mahārāju to the Karaṇams of the same village as sarvamānya on the cyclic year Plavanga to maintain the festivals on ratha saptami day in the temple (name not mentioned). Chinna Timmayadēva is described as the son of Timmarāja, grandson of Rāmarāju and the great grandson of Mahāmaṇḍaḻēśvara Āravīṭi Bukkarāju of Sōmavamsa. The gift village is situated in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, which iss given as nāyaṁkara to the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1470 A
gunēṁṭi kīlaka saṁvatsaramāgha śu 7lu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrīsadāsi(śi)vadēva mahārāya
lu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārū
ḍhulai pṛdhvī sāmrājyaṁcēyu cuṁḍaṁ
gānuśrīmaṁn mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ātrēya
gōtrapavitṛlaina sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaina
śrīkṛṣṇa pādāraviṁda dvitīya śā
vakulaina niśśīma bhūdāna cakrava¨rttulaIna
paramadhā¨rmikulaina vēdavākyapramāṇu ṇa
laIna Ārevīṭi bukkarājugāri prapautṛlu
rāmarājugāri pautṛlu tiṁmmarāju gā
ri putṛulu cina tiṁmayadēva mahā rā
juluṁgāru peddanapāṭigrāma karaṇā
laku Iccina dha¨rmma śāsanaṁ śrīsadāsi(śi)va
dēva mahārāyaluṁgāru mānāyaṁkarā
naku pāliṁcina ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōni
grāmaṁ pedanapāṭigrāma karaṇālanu
plapaṁganu (saṁ)patsarānanu vilā karaṇīkamānyāla
vritti mānyāla cēlakuṁnnu varimaḷakuṁ
tu yī tadhātidhi radhasaptami
lamaṁdu dhāravōśi sa¨rvamā
stimigāna mī putrapautra
pāraṁparyamugānu Ācaṁdrā
[¨rkkastāyigā]nu Anubhaviṁci bradikē
nīlōkē sa¨rvēṣāṁ mē
jyā nakaragrāhyā
dharāṁ . maṁgaḷamahā
jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 31.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
